nasb.text: For day by day men came to David to help him, until there was a great army like the army of God.

esv.text: For from day to day men came to David to help him, until there was a great army, like an army of God.

cnv.text: 那時，天天都有人投奔大衛，要幫助他，以致成了一支大軍，好像　神的軍兵一樣。

ccb.text: 那时天天有人来投奔大卫，以致形成一支大军，好像上帝的军队。
